review_1: Had a wonderful lunch last  Saturday at Misato in Centerpoint Orchard with my wife! review_1: My girlfriend and I had a wonderful and memorable Valentine's Day dinner at Araya  It was our first time having Chilean cuisine and it didn't disappoint. review_3: My wife and I celebrated our birthday there. Service and ambience were impeccable. Food and wine pairing was done very well. review_3: This place is a hidden gem for Korean food in Singapore. I've been on the hunt for authentic Korean pancakes, and many places felt lacking, but the chive pancake here is delicious. Since the prices are surprisingly affordable, I'll definitely be visiting again.
